guardrails: Action surface presentation should read explicit action identities instead of parsing rendered button text.
Action presentation does not create new capabilities beyond action-state derivation.
Boards keep Save, Notes, and Bookmarks unavailable while Export Source may remain active.
Export Source and Export Output remain distinct actions.
